name: White Chili with Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breast; cut into 1-inch cubes
4 Tomatillos; husks and stems removed, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans and their liquid in a large pot over low heat.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet and saute the onion and garlic until golden.
3. Add the chicken and saute until lightly browned.
4. Stir the chicken mixture into the bean pot along with the tomatillos, corn, cumin, oregano, green chilies, and chicken broth.
5. Simmer uncovered for 20 minutes.
6. Just before serving, stir in lime juice and cilantro.
7. Serve, if desired, with garnishes such as chopped red onion, grated Monterey Jack cheese, sliced jalapeno peppers, and chunks of avocado.
